subtitle: Run the organization from the top: read the whole business first, then drop into a branch only when local action is needed.

branchScope.label: Active branch tools
branchScope.hint: Branch-specific tools will open for the selected branch while organization-wide pages stay at company scope.

overview.title: Owner cockpit
overview.description: Start with the business across all accessible branches: what needs attention, how today is moving, and whether the month is closing cleanly.
overview.branchPerformanceDescription: Review today’s movement, team coverage, and month-close status branch by branch.
overview.awaitingCloseHint: This branch has not closed the selected month yet.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.description: This is the founder-owned surface for branch setup, branch identity, and cross-branch menu operations.
restaurants.branchCardHint: Branch menus stay independent first. Use this route to keep ownership clear before deeper branch refactors land.
restaurants.switchHint: Use the branch switcher in the header before opening branch-specific tools.

actions.branchSetupDescription: Create branches, switch active branch, and compare or copy menus.
actions.identityDescription: Manage branch contact details, tax defaults, and payment configuration.
actions.homepageDescription: Update the public-facing story, gallery, and homepage content for the active branch.

people.title: People
people.description: Control organization access and branch staffing from one owner surface while keeping branch employee operations explicit.
people.staffingDescription: See team size across branches, then jump straight into the branch team workspace when you need to hire, schedule, or correct attendance.
people.employeePermissionNotice: You can review organization access here, but your current role does not include employee visibility across branches.
people.accessDescription: Founder, finance, accountant, and branch manager access stays centralized and auditable here.
people.directoryDescription: Search all visible employees across branches before drilling into a specific branch team.

money.title: Money
money.description: Read the combined business first: month-close coverage, roll-up profit, and branch-by-branch finance drill-down.
money.orgCostsHint: Purchasing and expense totals from closed months
money.closeCoverageHint: Closed snapshots for the selected month
money.closeAttentionHint: {count} branches still need month close before the combined numbers are complete.
money.closeAttentionDone: Every visible branch has a closed snapshot for this month.
money.branchRollupDescription: Use the combined numbers to scan the business, then open one branch when you need to inspect or close that location.
money.awaitingCloseHint: No closed snapshot for this branch in the selected month.
money.branchDetailDescription: This is the selected branch workspace for month navigation, export, and close actions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Founder-owned business settings should live here as identity, org defaults, and branch setup are moved out of the old dashboard.
settings.organizationDescription: Manage shared access and organization-level defaults.
settings.restaurantDescription: Keep branch identity, payment defaults, and tax defaults under founder control.
settings.homepageDescription: Control the public-facing story and branch presentation from a founder-owned surface.
